## Summary

Describe the user-visible outcome and the modules changed.

## Verification

- [ ] `pnpm typecheck`
- [ ] `pnpm lint`
- [ ] `pnpm format:check`
- [ ] `pnpm test`
- [ ] Browser/package checks where relevant

## Privacy and scope

- [ ] Fixtures and screenshots are entirely synthetic.
- [ ] No real Codex/Claude JSONL, database, Prompt/response, source code, raw test output, credential, `.env`, or identifying absolute path is included.
- [ ] New persisted/displayed fields are documented.
- [ ] Claims describe observed associations, not exact AI attribution.
